name: Mushroom Millet Magic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking dish with sesame oil.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, stirring gradually until the triticale flour is fully incorporated.
4. Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
